hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.tf$'; then cd "$(dirname "$FILE")" && terraform fmt -check "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 'HOOK WARNING: Terraform file not formatted. Run: terraform fmt'; terraform validate 2>/dev/null || echo 'HOOK WARNING: Terraform validation failed'; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'viewstore-liquibase.*\.xml$'; then if grep -q '<changeSet' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then if ! grep -q '<rollback' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'HOOK WARNING: Liquibase changeset missing <rollback> block'; fi; if ! grep -qE 'id="[a-z0-9_-]+"' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo 'HOOK WARNING: Changeset ID should use lowercase with hyphens/underscores'; fi; fi; fi
FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then gitleaks detect --no-git --source "$(dirname "$FILE")" -v 2>&1 | head -5 || true; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'cpp-context-[^/]+/.+\.java$'; then MODULE_DIR="$FILE"; while [ "$MODULE_DIR" != '/' ] && [ ! -f "$MODULE_DIR/pom.xml" ]; do MODULE_DIR="$(dirname "$MODULE_DIR")"; done; if [ -f "$MODULE_DIR/pom.xml" ]; then echo "HOOK INFO: Java file changed in $(basename "$MODULE_DIR"). Consider running: mvn test -pl $(basename "$MODULE_DIR")"; fi; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'cpp-ui-[^/]+/.*\.(ts|html|scss)$'; then REPO_DIR="$FILE"; while [ "$REPO_DIR" != '/' ] && [ ! -f "$REPO_DIR/package.json" ]; do REPO_DIR="$(dirname "$REPO_DIR")"; done; if [ -f "$REPO_DIR/package.json" ]; then echo "HOOK INFO: UI file changed. Consider running: cd $REPO_DIR && npm run lint"; fi; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(values.*\.yaml|Chart\.yaml)$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'helm'; then CHART_DIR="$(dirname "$FILE")"; while [ "$CHART_DIR" != '/' ] && [ ! -f "$CHART_DIR/Chart.yaml" ]; do CHART_DIR="$(dirname "$CHART_DIR")"; done; if [ -f "$CHART_DIR/Chart.yaml" ]; then helm lint "$CHART_DIR" 2>&1 | tail -5 || echo 'HOOK WARNING: Helm lint failed'; fi; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.tf$'; then DIR="$(dirname "$FILE")"; if [ -d "$DIR/.git" ] || git -C "$DIR" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then if ! ls "$DIR/.pre-commit-config.yaml" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'HOOK WARNING: No .pre-commit-config.yaml found in Terraform repo. Install pre-commit hooks: pre-commit install'; fi; fi; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(domain|event)/.*\.java$' && echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'cpp-context-'; then REPO_DIR="$FILE"; while [ "$REPO_DIR" != '/' ] && [ ! -d "$REPO_DIR/.git" ]; do REPO_DIR="$(dirname "$REPO_DIR")"; done; SCHEMA_DIR="$REPO_DIR"; if [ -d "$SCHEMA_DIR/src/main/resources/json/schema" ]; then echo "HOOK INFO: Domain/event file changed. Verify compatibility with schemas in $SCHEMA_DIR/src/main/resources/json/schema/"; fi; fi

CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only); if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q '\.tf$'; then echo 'Running terraform fmt check on staged .tf files...'; for f in $(echo "$CHANGED" | grep '\.tf$'); do terraform fmt -check "$f" 2>/dev/null || { echo "HOOK ERROR: $f is not formatted. Run: terraform fmt $f"; exit 1; }; done; fi

CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only); if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -qE '\.(ts|html|scss)$' && [ -f 'package.json' ]; then echo 'Running Angular lint on staged files...'; npm run lint --silent 2>&1 | tail -10 || echo 'HOOK WARNING: Lint issues detected'; fi
if command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then gitleaks protect --staged -v 2>&1 | head -10; else echo 'HOOK INFO: gitleaks not installed. Consider: brew install gitleaks'; fi

CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only); if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q 'viewstore-liquibase.*\.xml$'; then for f in $(echo "$CHANGED" | grep 'viewstore-liquibase.*\.xml$'); do if grep -q '<changeSet' "$f" && ! grep -q '<rollback' "$f"; then echo "HOOK WARNING: $f has changesets without rollback blocks"; fi; done; fi
